'''harate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:leetle|leetle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-r-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leetle|leetle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| harate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:harate|harate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:haratesher|haratesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:haratesherĂ«m|haratesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:haratero|haratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:harateshĂ«|harateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:harateshĂ«m|harateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiharatero|gokiharatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiharateshĂ«|gokiharateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiharateshĂ«m|gokiharateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goharankerom|goharankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goharankeshĂ«|goharankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goharankeshĂ«m|goharankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goharankeya|goharankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:haraterom|haraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:haratemu|haratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:harateya|harateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiharaterom|gokiharaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiharatemu|gokiharatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiharateya|gokiharateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:hararate|hararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hararatesher|hararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hararatesherĂ«m|hararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hararatero|hararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hararateshĂ«|hararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hararateshĂ«m|hararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihararatero|gokihararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihararateshĂ«|gokihararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihararateshĂ«m|gokihararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohararankerom|gohararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohararankeshĂ«|gohararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohararankeshĂ«m|gohararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohararankeya|gohararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hararaterom|hararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hararatemu|hararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hararateya|hararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihararaterom|gokihararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihararatemu|gokihararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihararateya|gokihararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:hĂŠrĂŠte|hĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hĂŠrĂŠtesher|hĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|hĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠrĂŠtero|hĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|hĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|hĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠrĂŠtero|gokihĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokihĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokihĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohĂŠrĂŠnkerom|gohĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|gohĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gohĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohĂŠrĂŠnkeya|gohĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠrĂŠterom|hĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠrĂŠtemu|hĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hĂŠrĂŠteya|hĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠrĂŠterom|gokihĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokihĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihĂŠrĂŠteya|gokihĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:hafrafte|hafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hafraftesher|hafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafraftesherĂ«m|hafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafraftero|hafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafrafteshĂ«|hafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafrafteshĂ«m|hafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafraftero|gokihafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafrafteshĂ«|gokihafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafrafteshĂ«m|gokihafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohafrafnkerom|gohafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafrafnkeshĂ«|gohafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafrafnkeshĂ«m|gohafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohafrafnkeya|gohafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafrafterom|hafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafraftemu|hafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hafrafteya|hafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafrafterom|gokihafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafraftemu|gokihafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihafrafteya|gokihafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
